output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?managerLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q18656 p:P1060 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1060 ?manager .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?endDate .
  }
  ?manager rdfs:label ?managerLabel .
  FILTER(langMatches(lang(?managerLabel) , "en"))
  FILTER(?startDate <= "2017-12-31")
  FILTER(! BOUND(?endDate) || ?endDate >= "2017-01-01")
}
